name: Sequential PDLC
description: Default pattern: Requirements → Architecture → Planning → Testing → Release. Each stage runs to completion before next begins. Suitable for standard feature development.

name: Parallel Validation
description: Run multiple reviewers/extensions simultaneously (e.g., core architecture + finance compliance + tax validation). Converge results at decision gate. Suitable for high-stakes or regulated features.

name: Critique Panel Review
description: Gather multiple independent perspectives on a decision gate (e.g., 3 architecture reviewers, 2 security experts). Vote-based or consensus decision. Suitable for critical architectural decisions.

name: Lightweight Architecture
description: Abbreviated sequential: Requirements → Architecture only (skip planning/testing for low-risk changes). Quick validation for minor features or configuration changes.
